ChangeRequest.title: Change Request
ChangeRequest.description: IT Change Request Document detailing system modifications, justifications, impact, assignee, comments, and action histories.

crNumber.description: Unique auto-generated sequential change request number (format: CR-YYYY-XXXX)

title.description: Title of the proposed change request

description.description: Detailed explanation of requirements or issues

reason.description: Justification or reason for the change

systemName.description: Target computer system, application, or system module to be modified

category.description: Type of work or category of modification

priority.description: Level of urgency or business priority

status.description: Current workflow status of the change request

requesterName.description: Full name of the request submitter

requesterEmail.description: Email address of the request submitter

impactAnalysis.description: Analysis of potential system or operations impact

assignedTo.description: Name of the assigned engineer or developer

assignedEmail.description: Email of the assigned engineer or developer

comments.description: Collection of discussion comments from system team members

history.description: Audit trail log of actions taken on the document

/change_requests/{changeRequestId}.description: Collection of computer system change requests logs and workflows.
